title: Property Type
description: Optional type identifier for animatable properties, allowing parsers to determine the value type without full schema awareness.

oneOf.title: Scalar
oneOf.description: Single numeric value (e.g., opacity, rotation angle).

oneOf.title: Vector
oneOf.description: Array of numbers with variable length.

oneOf.title: Position
oneOf.description: 2D vector representing a position in space.
